title: Comments inside JSX expressions should be enclosed in curly braces
description:
Comments inside JSX expressions should be enclosed in curly bracesAnalyze your codeintentionality-logicalreliabilityBugreactWhy is this an issue?More InfoJSX lets you write HTML-like markup inside a JavaScript file, commonly used in React.Adding comments inside JSX might be tricky as JSX code is neither a plain HTML nor JavaScript.HTML comments () are not valid syntax in JSX.JavaScript-style comments, single or multiline, will create an additional text node in the browser, which is probably not expected.
// Noncompliant: text inside node
To avoid that, use JavaScript multiline comments enclosed in curly braces. Single-line comments can also be used, but avoid having the ending bracket in the same line.
{ /* multi-line comment */ } { // single-line comme
recommendation: Refactor to eliminate the flagged pattern.

checks.message: Comments inside JSX expressions should be enclosed in curly braces.
